After: 2.1µs with singleton

vllm.title: [LoRA] Much faster startup when LoRA is enabled
vllm.author: andylolu2
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Starting a server with LoRA takes a very long time, especially if --max-loras is set to a large-ish value.
It takes a long time because every call to dummy_run destroys and re-creates dummy lora weights.
In this PR, I make the lora destruction optional, such that consecutive runs of dummy_ru

vllm.title: [Core][Multimodal] Allow passing `multi_modal_uuids` as multimodal identifiers.
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR is a follow-up to #23308 and #22711. Since multimodal hashes will now be required for the upcoming reworked multimodal encoder cache, we want to allow users to be able to pass in their own multimodal identifiers in case hashing tensors results in non-negligible overhead.
This PR allo
